popularStory.description:
SAMUEL PACKARD (1612-1694)
ELIZABETH ______

zh.lifeSummary: 當Samuel Packard於1612年9月17日之前出生在英國素福爾可斯頓哈姆 阿斯帕爾時，他的父親George Packard37歲，母親Mary Wyther38歲。他於大約1635年與Elizabeth Stream在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯頓哈姆 阿斯帕爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他於1654年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可維姆斯且於1664年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯布利其沃特。他於1675年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布利其沃特被列為constable。他去世於1684年11月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯布利其沃特，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯布利其沃特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Samuel Packard于1612年9月17日之前出生在英国素福爾可斯頓哈姆 阿斯帕爾时，他的父亲George Packard37岁，母亲Mary Wyther38岁。他于大约1635年与Elizabeth Stream在英国英格兰素福爾可斯頓哈姆 阿斯帕爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他于1654年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可維姆斯且于1664年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯布利其沃特。他于1675年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布利其沃特被列为constable。他去世于1684年11月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯布利其沃特，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯布利其沃特。

nameMeanings.name: Packard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English pak(e) ‘pack, bundle’ + the Anglo-Norman French pejorative suffix -ard, probably a derogatory occupational name for a peddler.
English: pejorative derivative of the Middle English personal name   Pack  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Packert, Päckert, from ancient Germanic personal names formed with a word meaning ‘battle’ or ‘to fight’; or a variant of Packer 2 (with excrescent -t).

variants.name: Pack
meanings: English (Kent and Devon): variant of Pask , derived from Middle English Pake ‘Easter, Passover’.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational name for a wholesale trader, from Middle Low German packe, German Pack ‘bundle, package’ (see Packer ). Compare Pak .
Dutch: variant, archaic or Americanized, of   Pak  , a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Samuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (Hebrew Shemuel), possibly meaning ‘He (God) has hearkened’ (presumably to the prayers of a mother for a son). It may also be understood as a contracted form of Hebrew sha'ulme'el meaning ‘asked of God’. In the case of Samuel the son of Hannah, this would be more in keeping with his mother's statement ‘Because I have asked him of the Lord’ (1 Samuel 1:20). Living in the 11th century bc , Samuel was a Hebrew judge and prophet of the greatest historical importance, who established the Hebrew monarchy, anointing as king both Saul and, later, David. In the Authorized Version two books of the Old Testament are named after him, although in Roman Catholic and Orthodox versions of the Bible they are known as the first and second Book of Kings. The story of Samuel being called by God while still a child serving in the house of Eli the priest (1 Samuel 3) is of great vividness and has moved countless generations. In England and America the name was particularly popular among the 16th-century Puritans and among Nonconformists from the 17th to the 19th century. It became fashionable again in the 1990s.

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Samuel Packard was born before 17 September 1612, in Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, England, his father, George Packard, was 37 and his mother, Mary Wyther, was 38. He married Elizabeth Stream about 1635, in Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 9 daughters. He lived in Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1654 and Bridgewater, Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1664. In 1675, his occupation is listed as constable in Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 7 November 1684, in Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Samuel Packardが1612年9月17日以前にイギリススフォルクストンハム アスプアルで生まれた時，父George Packardは37歳，母Mary Wytherは38歳であった。約1635年にイギリスイギリススフォルクストンハム アスプアルでElizabeth Streamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1654年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクウエイモウスに，1664年にはイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニープリモウスブリジェワターに住んでいた。1675年，イギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーブリジェワターでの職業はconstableと記録されている。彼は1684年11月7日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスブリジェワターで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスブリジェワターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Samuel Packard(이)가 1612년 9월 17일 이전 영국 수폴크 스토함 아스팔에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Packard(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Wyther(은)는 38세였다. 그는 대략 1635년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토함 아스팔에서 Elizabeth Stream(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 1654년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 베이모우스에서, 1664년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스 브리지왓어에서 살았다. 1675년, 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리지왓어에서 constable이었다. 그는 1684년 11월 7일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 브리지왓어에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 브리지왓어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Packard nasceu antes 17 de setembro de 1612, em Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, George Packard, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mary Wyther, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Stream aproximadamente 1635, em Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele viveu em Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1654 e em Bridgewater, Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1664. Em 1675, sua profissão aparece como constable em Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 7 de novembro de 1684, em Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Samuel Packard родился перед 17 сентябрь 1612 г. в местности стонам аспаль, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени George Packard было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Wyther, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Stream около 1635 г. в местности стонам аспаль, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Он жил в местности вимоут, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1654 году и в местности бриджюэитир, плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1664 году. В 1675 году он работал по профессии constable в местности бриджюэитир, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 7 ноября 1684 г. в местности бриджюэитир, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности бриджюэитир, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Samuel Packard nació antes de 17 de septiembre de 1612, en Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, George Packard, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mary Wyther, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Stream aproximadamente 1635, en Stonham Aspal, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 9 hijas. Vivió en Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1654 y en Bridgewater, Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1664. En 1675, su ocupación registrada era constable en Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 7 de noviembre de 1684, en Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultado en Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
